mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, image_url AS imageUrl, category_id AS categoryId, price, stock, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM products WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, name, description, sort, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM categories ORDER BY sort ASC

SELECT id, name, description, image_url AS imageUrl, category_id AS categoryId, price, stock, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM products WHERE status = 1 AND category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, p.price, p.stock, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT id, image_url AS imageUrl FROM products WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: update products set stock = stock + #{quantity}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, p.price, p.stock, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
